evidence_summary: Establish the social aftermath of combat by transitioning from high-adrenaline violence to communal validation and individual empathy. The scene must contrast the loud, boisterous approval of the martian_warriors with the quiet, intimate concern shown by so...

Martian warriors, including Tars Tarkas, arrive to witness the aftermath. They applaud his strength. Sola approaches with genuine concern for his well-being, providing a soft emotional counterpoint to the warriors' laughter.
